examples: There was a metallic click and the gates swung open.
He had painted all the wood with metallic silver paint.
Even the smallest metallic object, whether a nail file or cigarette lighter, is immediately confiscated.
Giant lathes and centrifuges surround our metallic table, and the hum of machinery fills the air.
They're typically made of a metallic weave that can include carbon, lead and potassium.
